response:
Jeanette starts with 3 objects. She adds 2 each week.  
* * *  
Week one has 5 objects. Week two has 7 objects.  
* * *  
Week three has 9 objects. Week four has 11 objects.  
* * *  
Week five has 13 objects. Total is 45 objects.  
* * *  
She practices for 5 weeks. She juggles 13 objects.  
* * *  
Each week increases by 2. Total adds up to 45.  
* * *  
Juggling improves weekly. Practice leads to growth.
